# Evaluation Snapshot

## Prompt
First decide whether enough authority exists before any operational action proceeds.

## Expected selection
do_not_use

## Why
This is an approval question, not an infrastructure-change shaping task.

## Expected object
A deflection that points to approval-gate logic instead of trying to plan the infra change itself.

## Boundary notes
The right answer should not mix authority classification into infra execution advice.

## Verification hooks
- says the main question is authority
- redirects to approval-gate handling
- avoids operational execution guidance
- does not pretend the change can proceed by default
